info.title: WSF API
info.description: Woven Sovereignty Fabric trust-plane API: trust tokens, sealed envelopes, cloud-credential brokering, and the receipt ledger. All signatures are ML-DSA-87 and verify off-host.

post.summary: Issue a signed trust token. Tenant/subject/roles come from the authenticated principal (x-wsf-identity required); the body may only narrow (models, budget).
Verify a token's signature, revocation status, and expiry.
Mint a narrower child from a parent. The parent is authenticated (signature/expiry/revocation) and every authority axis must narrow; fails closed on a forged parent or any widening.
Seal a payload into an envelope (Transit-wrapped data key + provenance thread).
Unseal an envelope for a token-authorized op.
Exchange a verified token for ephemeral cloud credentials via a tenant-scoped named grant (grant_id, never a raw role ARN).

403.description: Token rejected/expired or grant denied (unknown or cross-tenant).

get.summary: Query the receipt ledger, tenant-scoped to the authenticated principal (x-wsf-identity required).

200.description: The principal's tenant receipts (or all, for a global-auditor).
